name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionTextAttributes
summary: The DimensionTextAttributes class controls the dimension value representation.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionTextAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new dimension text attributes instance. By default the default font is used, no frame is drawn and the value text is above the dimension line.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionTextAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new dimension text attributes instance with the given parameters.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: The frame type of the dimension value text.

properties.name: TextPlacing
properties.summary: The place of the dimension value text.
